calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Discharged

Notice Of Motion And Amotion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is vacated and PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC.'s Amotion For Assignment Of Rights is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. Judge: Monica Wiley, not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Erin Wade, Esq. appeared for plaintiff ABS Seafood, Inc., a California Corporation, dba ABS Seafood Co.
Toni Nguyen, plaintiff's Chief Financial Officer, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by William Francis Alber, individually and dba WF Alber Seafoods.
Amended Default was entered against defendant on April 15, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff ABS Seafood, inc, a California Corporation, dba ABS Seafood Co., and against the Defaulted Defendant William Francis Alber, individually and dba WF Alber Seafoods as follows:

Damages/Principal - $64,618.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,691.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $725.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $73,034.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Continued To Jun-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Continued To Mar-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
